description_long: This is a compact, modern bullpup-style rifle with a distinctive urban graffiti paint scheme featuring yellow, orange, and white markings over a dark base. The rifle has a prominent integrated carrying handle and rail system on top, with iron sights mounted at the front and rear. The magazine is mounted horizontally along the top of the weapon, characteristic of the FN P90 design, and is semi-transparent, allowing partial visibility of the ammunition inside. The stock is integrated into the body, giving the weapon a short overall length while maintaining a full-length barrel. The muzzle features a perforated muzzle brake or compensator, and the trigger guard is large and rounded, suitable for gloved use. The overall finish is matte with visible wear and urban-themed graffiti, suggesting use in a gritty, street-level environment.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with an urban graffiti paint scheme, integrated top rail, and a horizontal magazine. The design is modern, with a matte finish and visible iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake, front iron sight, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the graffiti paint, integrated top rail, horizontal magazine, and large trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, rear iron sight, and the slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the graffiti details, magazine, and overall compact bullpup design.
